ksa_text: Knowledge of AI-specific regulatory frameworks, including the EU AI Act risk classification system, prohibited practices, high-risk AI system requirements, conformity assessment obligations, and AI literacy mandates.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Regulatory Compliance is an edge domain for the Chief of Staff to CDAIO, this knowledge KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.51) and conceptual alignment to include at the senior specialist level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: GDPR, CCPA, EU AI Act, and SEC data governance regulations confirm regulatory compliance knowledge for governance-focused leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Regulatory Compliance appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Chief of Staff to CDAIO.
